summary: Single migration implementing CTB Cantonal refactor for lcs schema: creates lcs.lcs_canonical (one row per sovereign_id, session-var guard trigger), lcs.lcs_errors (append-only with CHECK constraints matching repo pattern), lcs.lcs_intake (view over cid_intake), updates fn_process_cid to UPSERT canonical and log errors, updates fn_finalize_dispatch to update canonical dispatch state and log errors, reclassifies cid_intake/sid_registry/mid_ledger from CANONICAL to SUPPORTING in CTB registry. All v0 enforcement preserved.

functions: lcs.fn_process_cid(uuid) — adds canonical UPSERT + error logging
lcs.fn_finalize_dispatch(uuid, jsonb) — adds canonical update + error logging

canonical_guard.enforcement: trg_lcs_canonical_guard blocks INSERT/UPDATE unless session var is 'on'

error_logging.fn_process_cid: Validation failures (not found, not PENDING, expired) log to lcs_errors + return NULL. Unexpected exceptions caught via EXCEPTION block.
error_logging.fn_finalize_dispatch: Validation failures (MID not found, missing/invalid outcome) log to lcs_errors + return. FSM violations caught via EXCEPTION block.
